Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Multiple Shadows ahead! It looks like they've been waiting for us![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}And that strange presence is there too! The same one from before![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}It's gone...? I don't sense it anymore...[n]{f 1 1}
